summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Minutes Templates and Schedule A features. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Features verified: 6 template options, distribution/trustee appointment/property acceptance forms, Schedule A CRUD operations, auto-add to Schedule A, WHEREAS/RESOLVED language, editable preview, PDF download.

issues: Console warning about <tr> inside <span> element - minor HTML nesting issue that doesn't affect functionality

backend_api: GET /api/template-options returns 6 templates with required fields
POST /api/minutes-templates creates distribution template with all fields
POST /api/minutes-templates creates additional trustee template with name/gender/signature fields
POST /api/minutes-templates acceptance_of_property auto-adds asset to Schedule A
DELETE /api/schedule-a/{id} removes asset (verified with 404 on GET)
frontend_ui: Minutes Templates page shows 6 template cards
Distribution template form has Meeting Information section
Distribution template form has Distribution Details with Amount/Date/Characterization
Distribution template form has Add Beneficiary button
Trustee Appointment form has New Trustee Name, Gender, Signature Requirement fields
Property Acceptance form has 'Automatically add to Schedule A' checkbox
Property Acceptance form shows Asset Category dropdown when checkbox checked
Schedule A page displays assets grouped by category with totals
Schedule A Add Asset dialog opens with all fields
Schedule A edit/delete actions available (3 edit, 3 delete buttons found)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ScheduleAPage.js has potential HTML nesting issue with <span> wrapping <tr> elements inside <tbody> - React/view-engine dev tool inserts spans that cause hydration warnings. Consider refactoring map() logic.
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data with Smith Family Trust containing 3 Schedule A assets (real property, personal property, financial accounts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Minutes Templates feature fully working: 6 templates available at /minutes/templates (blank, general_meeting, distribution_to_beneficiaries, acceptance_of_property, appointment_additional_trustee, appointment_successor_trustee). Schedule A at /schedule-a shows assets grouped by 8 categories with totals. Property acceptance auto-adds to Schedule A when checkbox checked. Generated minutes contain WHEREAS/RESOLVED language. Preview is editable via data-testid='generated-document'. PDF download returns base64.

property_acceptance_auto_add.verified: Asset auto-added to Schedule A when checkbox checked
